title: Youmind 22016 3D
prompt: Cinematic portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young woman"} standing side by side with her {argument name="miniature style" default="miniature version"} against a textured dark wall background. Both are wearing matching {argument name="outfit color" default="elegant traditional royal blue dresses"} with intricate embroidery and flowing fabric, their hands folded gracefully. The adult woman leans slightly with a soft, gentle smile, while the miniature version has a {argument name="face style" default="cute, 3D cartoon-style face"} with large, expressive eyes. High-end editorial lighting, volumetric shadows, shot on 85mm lens, hyper-realistic details, 8K resolution.
